Uso: <script src="vendor/hash-wasm/argon2.umd.min.js" integrity="sha384-tP0Wy54CKmng7i9EoTlPySD0hBx6Octj0VS6MfwlnUu111MPa+JLm0CCbep6XJ1W" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
Expone window.hashwasm.argon2id. NO actualizar sin recalcular el SRI.
